description.zh: Observatory · 轨迹观察台(工作台)· 用 reactflow 把一次 agent 会话画成 session→turn→tool / 子 agent 的图,实时(SSE)+ 离线回放;并把拼好的 system-prompt 切成带 token 估算的模块切片,辅助上下文 / skill / 护栏 / cache 管理。
description.en: Observatory workbench — renders an agent session as a reactflow graph (session to turn to tool / sub-agent) with a live SSE tail + offline replay, and slices the composed system prompt into inspectable modules with token estimates; aids context / skill / guardrail / cache management.
